main.description: An agent class definition. Acts as a template that agents are instantiated from. The class is a named bundle of skills (strongRefs to com.publicdomainrelay.temp.agent.skill records) plus optional metadata. Instantiating an agent from a class means spawning a runtime (or sub-agent context) seeded with this skill set.

name.description: Human-readable name of the agent class, e.g. 'compute-requester'.

description.description: Description of what agents instantiated from this class are for and what they can do.

skills.description: Strong references to com.publicdomainrelay.temp.agent.skill records that compose this class.

parent.description: Optional strongRef to a parent agent.class. Instantiated agents inherit the parent's skills as well as this class's skills.

spawnsSubAgent.description: If true, agents of this class are intended to be spawned as sub-agents from a parent agent's flow rather than as a top-level runtime.

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this class record was created.
